01 — About

Who I Am

I'm a third-year Computer Science student at Keshav Memorial Engineering College, Hyderabad, with a strong foundation in Applied AI and Machine Learning. My work sits at the intersection of computer vision, LLMs, and real-world impact.

I've done research at IIIT Hyderabad's iHub-Data under Dr. C.K. Raju, working on YOLOv11-based crowd safety systems. Currently, I'm exploring security risks in local LLM deployments — a space that's both urgent and underexplored.

I care deeply about building AI that matters — systems that help dyslexic children learn, farmers protect crops, and communities stay safe.

03 — Experience

Research & Work

MAY 2025 — AUG 2025
Research Intern
iHub-Data, IIIT Hyderabad · Under Dr. C.K. Raju
  • Researched YOLOv11-based object detection for real-time crowd stampede risk detection and prevention in dense, safety-critical scenarios
  • Focused on key challenges: occlusion handling, false positive reduction, and real-time deployment constraints
  • Evaluated detection robustness across varying crowd densities for safety-critical decision systems
  • Published Certificate of Proficiency by iHub-Data, IIIT Hyderabad

04 — Projects

What I've Built

PROJECT / 01

JoyVerse — Gamified Learning for Dyslexic Children

Social-Impact AI · EdTech · Assistive Technology

A comprehensive AI-driven cognitive assessment platform designed to make learning accessible and engaging for dyslexic children. The system combines facial emotion recognition with gamified tasks to provide real-time therapeutic insights.

Key Features

  • Vision Transformer + MediaPipe Face Mesh for engagement analysis and emotional feedback in real time
  • Role-based dashboards for therapists and parents to monitor gameplay behaviour and cognitive traits
  • 5 custom-designed gamified learning tasks with therapy workflow integration
  • Behavioural analysis pipeline enabling specialist session scheduling for children
React Vision Transformer MediaPipe Face Mesh Python
PROJECT / 02

Leaf Disease Detection & Agricultural Advisory System

AgriTech · Computer Vision · RAG

A production-ready plant disease diagnosis platform for farmers, combining cutting-edge vision AI with a continuously updated multilingual knowledge base from official Indian agricultural sources.

⚡ 97.6% Classification Accuracy across 5 crops

Key Features

  • Vision Transformer pipeline achieving ~97.6% accuracy across 5 crops including tomato, potato, corn, grape, apple
  • Multilingual advisory using StreamRAG with live ICAR/IPM RSS feeds for always-current recommendations
  • Soil Health Card parameter integration for personalised treatment advice
  • Hypothetical Document Embeddings (HDE) to enhance retrieval for rare diseases
Streamlit Vision Transformer StreamRAG ICAR/IPM APIs HDE
